zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Lauton於大約1230年出生在英國英格蘭。她和Richard de Lauton至少有1個女兒。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Lauton于大约1230年出生在英国英格兰。她和Richard de Lauton至少有1个女儿。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lauton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Leighton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Leighton or Layton. Most, as for example those in Bedfordshire, Cambridgeshire, Cheshire, Lancashire, and Shropshire, are named with Old English lēac ‘leek’ + tūn ‘settlement’, but Layton in Durham derives from Old English ge-lād ‘road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English pronunciation of Leighton is usually /lɛ:tən/ or /leitən/ (also spelled Layton and Leaton ), but it can also be heard as /laitən/ or as /li:tən/ (also spelled Leaton ), and occasionally as /lɛtən/ (spelled Letton ).

variants.name: Leyton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Juan Carlos, Alonso, Amalia, Ana, Carlos, Erasmo, Fernando, Jorge, Jose Carlos, Mauricio.
Spanish: altered form of Galician Leitón, a nickname meaning ‘suckling pig’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Lauton was born about 1230, in England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 daughter with Richard de Lauton. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Lauton est née environ 1230, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Richard de Lauton. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Lauton wurde um 1230 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit Richard de Lauton mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Lauton è nata il circa 1230 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Richard de Lauton. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Kenyon, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアケニーオン
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Lautonは約1230年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。彼女はRichard de Lautonとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Lauton(은)는 대략 1230년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Richard de Lauton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Lauton nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Richard de Lauton. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Lauton родилась около 1230 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Richard de Lauton. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Lauton nació aproximadamente 1230, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Richard de Lauton. Murió en su pueblo.
